name: Greek Linguine
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 4 Servings
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, cook the spinach according to package directions.
2. Add chickpeas and raisins; stir occasionally until heated through for 3-4 minutes.
3. Transfer mixture to a large bowl; add linguine, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
4. Toss until combined.
Each serving provides: 1 Fat; 1 Protein; 1 Vegetable; 2 Breads; 1/2 Fruit.
Per Serving With Salt: 450 Milligrams Sodium; 0 Cholesterol.
Per Serving Without Salt: 165 Milligrams Sodium; 0 Cholesterol.
